# chrony C ‚Üî chrony-rs port-parity matrix

A 1:1 completeness catalog of **every** chrony 4.5 `.c` translation unit against
its chrony-rs counterpart. The C inventory is authoritative (doxygen); the status
column is curated and deliberately conservative ‚Äî see `docs/port-parity.md` for
method, provenance, and how the doxygen runs were produced on both sides.

> C inventory provenance: chrony 4.5 C function inventory (doxygen 1.9.8, commit 120dfb8b36b942c31ddfc0220ca1475159ac5031)

## Headline completeness

- **C translation units:** 70 `.c` files, 1373 functions (doxygen).
- **Files with any chrony-rs counterpart:** 29 / 70 (19 full, 8 partial, 2 scaffold); **41** have none.
- **Files fully ported:** 19 / 70 ‚Äî every function in the unit has a court-backed counterpart (dependency-free TUs first). chrony-rs remains an early-stage forensic reconstruction; this number is stated, not hidden.
- **Loose upper bound on function coverage:** files with a counterpart contain 773 / 1373 C functions (56.3%). This is an *upper bound only* ‚Äî a file marked partial ports a fraction of its functions, so true coverage is well below this. chrony-rs ports behavior under court, not functions 1:1.

- **chrony-rs native inventory (`syn` AST):** 637 named functions + 92 closures across 47 `.rs` files. Extracted from the real AST, not doxygen ‚Äî see the limitation notice in `docs/port-parity.md`.

Legend: ‚óè full = every function ported under court ¬∑ ‚óë partial = some behavior ported with an executable court ¬∑ ‚óã scaffold = type/simulated stand-in only ¬∑ ¬∑ none = no counterpart.

## Coverage notes (files with a counterpart)

- **`conf.c`** ‚Äî directive recognition (93/93), comment rules, diagnostics witnessed vs 4.5; per-directive value semantics partial _(‚âà33 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`cmdparse.c`** ‚Äî all 8: source options + word split/normalize/refid/key/local + allow-deny (incl. DNS hostname via nameserv; drives addrfilt end-to-end vs `chronyc accheck`) _(‚âà37 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`ntp_core.c`** ‚Äî RFC 5905 ¬ß8 offset/delay algebra + 48-byte header codec; poll state machine not ported _(‚âà23 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`ntp_io.c`** ‚Äî packet bytes only; no socket IO _(‚âà14 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`pktlength.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 3 functions; per-command length/padding + per-reply length tables extracted exactly from candm.h offsets (compiled probe), not guessed _(‚âà7 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`ntp_ext.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 6 functions; TLV format/parse + packet add/parse with alignment, NTPv4, MAC-length and bounds checks; set/parse roundtrip tested _(‚âà17 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`sources.c`** ‚Äî 8-bit reach register (exact), selectability gate, falseticker intersection; full SRC_SelectSource not ported _(‚âà30 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`sourcestats.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 32 functions (the keystone): dual circular buffers + weighted robust regression + jitter-asymmetry multiple regression + dump/reload; composes ALL of the verified regress engine; regression/prune/asymmetry/save-load tested _(‚âà39 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`regress.c`** ‚Äî all 11: weighted LS + runs-test + median-based robust + 2-var regression + t/chi2 tables + median; verified by TWO oracles -- the REAL compiled regress.c (80 differential vectors) and an independent reference impl _(‚âà24 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`samplefilt.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 18 functions; circular sample buffer + dispersion/offset selection + weighted-regression combine (composes the verified regress); select_samples' index-permutation computed directly to the same result; precision/time injected _(‚âà23 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`quantiles.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 8 functions (QNT_DestroyInstance = Drop); structural ‚Äî deterministic parts tested exactly, convergence statistically; chrony seeds random() non-deterministically so it is not byte-witnessable _(‚âà14 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`reference.c`** ‚Äî tracking report shape rendered (report.rs); drift/discipline state machine not ported _(‚âà42 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`local.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 35 functions; composes the ported sys_null driver (ClockDriver trait) + optional smooth hooks; raw clock/config injected, handlers id-registered (closures); discipline/temp-comp/precision/handler tests _(‚âà54 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`smooth.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 12 functions; the 3-stage bounded-freq/wander trajectory (update_stages/get_smoothing) verified vs a reference impl; time as seconds, config/skew injected, struct-as-handler _(‚âà17 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`tempcomp.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 5 functions; quadratic + point-table interpolation (points stored in the ported array::Array); temp injected, comp returned, points/coefs as data _(‚âà11 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`sched.c`** ‚Äî deterministic replay loop is a stand-in, not the SCH_ timer wheel _(‚âà13 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`client.c`** ‚Äî tracking/sources/sourcestats/activity/serverstats rendered (print_report+print_info_field engines, all print_* value helpers; all live-witnessed vs 4.5); 5 of ~40 process_cmd_* commands; no socket transport _(‚âà36 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`main.c`** ‚Äî --check-config and --replay only; no scheduler/privdrop/daemonize _(‚âà3 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`util.c`** ‚Äî pure primitives ported: NTP short/64 + era algebra, log2->seconds, hex codec, refid<->string; broad UTI_* surface (files, sockets, randomness) not _(‚âà39 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`array.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 10 functions over a flat Vec<u8> (slices where chrony returns pointers): exact capacity grow/shrink policy + order-preserving removal; no unsafe _(‚âà17 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`keys.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 17 functions for chrony's internal-MD5 build: key-file parse (ASCII/HEX), sorted store + binary-search + cache, MAC generate/verify (truncated), secure-length gate; differential-tested vs the REAL compiled keys.c (key file + per-id vectors) + an independent MD5(key||msg) check; CMAC cipher keys rejected at load (no crypto backend), as that build does _(‚âà27 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`md5.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 4 functions; byte-exact vs the official RFC 1321 ¬ßA.5 test vectors (dependency-free TU) _(‚âà10 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`hash_intmd5.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 3 functions; thin wrapper over the ported MD5 (RFC 1321 vectors), with the supported-algorithm gate and in1||in2 concat/truncation tested _(‚âà8 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`hwclock.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 7 functions; composes the ported quantile delay filter + robust regression over Vec<f64> sample buffers; clean-offset model verified vs reference; cook/precision/abs-freq injected _(‚âà11 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`sys_null.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 8 functions; the virtual-clock offset/frequency model (set_freq/accrue/offset_convert); raw time injected as seconds, driver-as-struct (no global LCL registration) _(‚âà10 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`addrfilt.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 16 functions (ADF_DestroyTable = Drop); decisions live-witnessed vs `chronyc accheck` on chrony 4.5 _(‚âà27 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`nameserv.c`** ‚Äî DNS_Name2IPAddress (first address) ported via the system resolver ‚Äî the one networked entry point; reverse lookup / family-set / reload not ported _(‚âà3 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`clientlog.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 35 functions: per-client hash table with oldest-record eviction, per-service token-bucket rate limiter with probabilistic leak, log2 request-rate estimate (incl. NTP timeout-rate inversion), and the interleaved-mode RX->TX timestamp map; differential-tested vs the REAL compiled clientlog.c (165-line vector fixture, injected reproducible RNG) + an independent token-bucket invariant _(‚âà48 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_
- **`manual.c`** ‚Äî complete port of all 11 functions; sample store + robust-regression slew/frequency estimate (uses the verified regress); time as seconds, REF correction returned not applied, struct-as-handler _(‚âà16 Rust `fn` in mapped modules)_

## What "partial"/"scaffold" deliberately does not mean

A counterpart is not a claim of equivalence. It means some behavior from that C
file is reconstructed and admitted by a court in `reports/`. Everything outside the
admitted courts is unported. Where a file is subsumed by the Rust standard library
(`memory.c`) or is upstream test scaffolding (`stubs.c`), that is noted
rather than counted as coverage.
